label: Bodleian Library MS. Bodl. 130
description: Herbarium. Ex herbis femininis (extracts). Liber medicinae ex animalibus.

metadata.label: Catalogue Description
metadata.value: Full catalogue record in Catalogue of Western Medieval Manuscripts in Oxford Libraries

metadata.label: Title
metadata.value: Herbarium. Ex herbis femininis (extracts). Liber medicinae ex animalibus.

metadata.label: Description
metadata.value: Contents: In two parts. Part 1: Ps.-Apuleius, Herbarium (ff. 1-67). Ps-Dioscorides, Ex herbis femininis (extracts) (ff. 68-75). Part 2: Sextus Placitus, Liber medicinae ex animalibus (ff. 76-95).

metadata.label: Description
metadata.value: Decoration: Fine miniatures (partly coloured drawings, partly painted). Partly copying an Anglo-Saxon model of 10th century, end. (P&A iii. 53, pl. VI)
